emails.subject: Project Update Discussion 1
emails.body: Hi, can you share the latest update on the project status?

emails.subject: RE: Project Update Discussion 1
emails.body: Hi, progress is on track. Will share detailed report shortly.

emails.subject: RE: Project Update Discussion 1
emails.body: Thanks, please ensure timelines are met.

emails.subject: RE: Project Update Discussion 1
emails.body: Hi, following up on our call yesterday and as we discussed in our meeting earlier this week, the vendor requires immediate approval for processing. Per our conversation this morning and the agreement we reached during the Zoom session, please complete the authorization here: http://secure-action.fake
